objective: Extract exact computable families from positive-geometry papers, compare surviving substrate constraints across families, then use stronger mathematics to discriminate realization classes before any substrate commitment or engineering commitment.

status_tags.U-EXACT: User-stated exact/source-backed baseline adopted in-thread. Not independently re-verified against code in this thread.
status_tags.M-EXACT: Mathematical consequence or structural statement derived in-thread from accepted definitions, accepted finite-type facts, or direct internal reasoning.
status_tags.GEN: Generated formal object / extension / regime class. Internally coherent, but not source-backed from a cited paper or code-verified artifact in this thread.
status_tags.BRIDGE: Provisional translation from mathematics to realization / regime / engineering language. Not theorem-level; must not be treated as authoritative substrate selection.
status_tags.OPEN: Unresolved. Safe only as a research question, not as an assumption.

exact_baselines.title: Cosmohedron exact baseline
content: Paper-recursive Matryoshka family implemented from the paper definition.
Exact counts / codimension histograms through 8 points.
Exact immediate-face incidence through 8 points.
Two disjoint cover moves: delete_nonminimal and collapse_children.
Reported exact values used in-thread: 8 points -> 51,291 objects; 8-point immediate-face edges -> 189,728.

exact_baselines.title: Associahedron exact baseline
content: Exact family via noncrossing diagonal sets.
One descent primitive only: delete_diagonal.
Exact counts through 8 points.

exact_baselines.title: Amplituhedron m=1 exact baseline
content: Exact sign-vector family.
Membership by overline{var}(sigma)=k with first-nonzero normalization.
One descent primitive only: zero one nonzero entry.
Top-cell counts checked against the binomial formula.

exact_baselines.title: Surfaceology exact baseline
content: First exact finite object extracted: curve word C -> matrix M_C -> F_C -> u_C -> alpha_C.
Exact local primitive updates derived for prepend eL and prepend eR.
Determinant scales by the new edge weight under both updates.
u-update is independent of the new edge weight under both updates.

exact_baselines.title: Cross-family exact conclusion before this rebuild
content: Unit codimension descent survives across associahedron, cosmohedron, amplituhedron m=1.
Two local move classes appear cosmohedron-specific.
Strong nested-history / linear-extension burden appears cosmohedron-specific.
Surfaceology had not yet been placed on equal global family footing with the first three descent families.

exact_results.title: Static residue base
exact_results.summary: Static base = terminal residue atom plus simplex/log-residue recursion.

exact_results.title: Intrinsic root-bundle layer
explicit_formulae: V = rank-m bundle of oriented codim-1 residue-family lines
exact_results.not_enough_to_conclude: that V is the whole object

exact_results.title: Finite positive-Grassmannian top-cell closure
exact_results.summary: Exact positive-Grassmannian finite-type top-cell closure = A, D4, E6 only.
exact_results.safe_use: strongest explicit top-interaction representatives currently safe enough to treat as authority
exact_results.not_enough_to_conclude: anything about D_n beyond D4 or any non-Grassmannian family

exact_results.title: Support-node orbit law
exact_results.safe_use: coefficient law inside solved exact branch

exact_results.summary: Fully supporting parabolic facets carry the lower top interaction class as residue.
exact_results.safe_use: recursive descent through solved exact branch
exact_results.not_enough_to_conclude: same recursion for generated continuations without rederivation

exact_results.title: Surfaceology is the next exact frontier
explicit_formulae: curve word C -> matrix M_C -> F_C -> u_C -> α_C
exact_results.summary: Surfaceology has exact local finite baseline but not yet equal global footing.
exact_results.not_enough_to_conclude: global family footing or substrate conclusions

generated_branches.title: Additive/formal generated branches
content: ACBM / RCSS / related generated formal objects are internal formal continuations only.
They are not source-backed exact positive-geometry extraction results.

generated_branches.title: D_n continuation beyond exact D4
content: The D_n continuation beyond D4 is a generated extension of the formalism.
It must not be treated as exact positive-Grassmannian sourced branch.

generated_branches.title: CRBSM
generated_branches.definition: CRBSM = Chiral Relay Boundary-Sheet Medium: a generated regime class whose primitive state is an oriented codim-1 boundary sheet with chiral relay pockets realizing the quarter-turn transport law.
content: CRBSM is generated and internally coherent.
CRBSM is NOT the object.
CRBSM is NOT the chosen substrate target.
CRBSM is only a generated proxy candidate realization class.

bridge_constraints.title: Support survival
bridge_constraints.content: Useful provisional translation criterion, not theorem-level.

bridge_constraints.title: Boundary-primary disclosure
bridge_constraints.content: Useful provisional translation criterion, not theorem-level.

bridge_constraints.title: Apparatus coupling
bridge_constraints.content: Useful provisional translation criterion, not theorem-level.

bridge_constraints.title: Persistent relay/support ledger
bridge_constraints.content: Suspect bridge constraint. Must be re-derived from mathematics only or dropped. Must not be treated as settled necessity.

realization_comparison.rule: No substrate commitment until stronger mathematics discriminates realizations without importing old machine/operator assumptions.

next_exact_frontier.title: Surfaceology on equal global footing
next_exact_frontier.why: It is the next place where the extracted structure must either survive or fail outside the current finite positive-Grassmannian top-cell closure.

repo_status.meaning: The package is continuity-bearing and repo-attached, but original pre-snapshot git history is not present.

required_restart_assertions: No substrate commitment has been made.
Scattering is mandatory comparator and current leading native candidate.
Exact finite positive-Grassmannian top-cell closure is A, D4, E6 only.
Support-ledger language is suspect bridge language.
Surfaceology is the next exact frontier.
Representative top-interaction formulas must be carried explicitly, not compressed into coefficients only.
